# BuyWhere — Agent-Native Product Catalog API (Full Reference)

> BuyWhere is a product catalog API designed for AI agents and LLM pipelines. It provides semantic product search across 1.5M+ products, normalized pricing data, real-time availability, and cross-border market matching. Based in Singapore, expanding globally.

## Table of Contents

1. Quick Start
2. Authentication
3. Product API Reference
4. Category & Merchant API
5. Comparison API
6. Analytics & Revenue API
7. MCP Server
8. SDKs & Packages
9. Pricing
10. Webhooks & Alerts
11. Rate Limits

---

## 1. Quick Start

```bash
# Get an API key: https://buywhere.ai/quickstart

# Search products
curl -X GET "https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/products/search" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer bw_live_YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -G --data-urlencode "q=wireless headphones" --data-urlencode "limit=5"

# Or install the MCP server
npx -y @buywhere/mcp-server
```

## 2. Authentication

**API Key (recommended):**
```
Authorization: Bearer bw_live_YOUR_API_KEY
```
Or use header: `X-Buywhere-Key: your_api_key`

**OAuth 2.0:**
```
Authorization: Bearer {token}
```

**Usage tracking:** All authenticated requests count toward your monthly quota. Unauthenticated requests to `/v1/catalog/stats`, `/v1/demo/search` have stricter rate limits.

**Register for an API key:**
```bash
curl -X POST "https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/auth/register" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"agent_name": "My Shopping Agent", "use_case": "price comparison"}'
```

## 3. Product API Reference

### Search Products
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/products/search
```

Parameters:
| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `q` | string | Search query (supports natural language) |
| `domain` | string | Filter by domain (e.g. "lazada_sg") |
| `region` | string | Region filter |
| `country_code` | string | 2-letter country code |
| `country` | string | Country name |
| `category` | string | Category name |
| `category_id` | integer | Category ID |
| `category_path` | string | Full category path |
| `brand` | string | Brand name |
| `merchant_id` | string | Merchant ID |
| `availability` | string | "in_stock" or "out_of_stock" |
| `min_price` | number | Minimum price |
| `max_price` | number | Maximum price |
| `currency` | string | Currency code (SGD, USD, MYR) |
| `limit` | integer | Results per page (max 100) |
| `offset` | integer | Pagination offset |
| `page` | integer | Page number |
| `fields` | string | Comma-separated field list |
| `sort` | string | Sort: relevance, price_asc, price_desc, newest, highest_rated, most_reviewed |
| `compact` | boolean | Compact response |

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "total": 47,
  "limit": 5,
  "offset": 0,
  "has_more": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 12345,
      "name": "Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones",
      "price": 429.00,
      "currency": "SGD",
      "source": "lazada_sg",
      "buy_url": "https://lazada.sg/products/...",
      "affiliate_url": "https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/track/12345",
      "image_url": "https://img.lazcdn.com/...",
      "is_available": true,
      "rating": 4.8,
      "category": "Electronics > Audio > Headphones",
      "merchant": "Sony Store SG",
      "buywhere_score": 0.92,
      "confidence": 0.95
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "query_info": { "q": "wireless headphones" }
  }
}
```

### Get Product Detail
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/products/{id}
```

Optional param: `include_history=true` for price history.

### Best Price / Find Cheapest
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/products/best-price?product_name={name}&country_code={code}
```
Returns the cheapest option across all merchants.

### Get Deals
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/products/deals
```
Parameters: `min_discount`, `currency`, `country_code`, `limit`, `offset`. Returns products sorted by discount percentage.

### Compare Products
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/products/compare?ids=id1,id2,id3
```
Compare 2-10 products side-by-side. Returns unified comparison with price, specs, and merchant info.

### Similar Products
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/products/{id}/similar?limit=8
```
Returns up to 8 similar products based on category and attributes.

### Price History
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/products/{id}/price-history?days=90
```
Daily aggregated price history. Options: 30, 90, 180 days.

```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/products/{id}/prices?days=90
```
Raw price snapshot history (max 90 days).

### Ingest Products (Bulk)
```
POST https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/products/ingest
Content-Type: application/json
```
Body: Array of product objects with `platform`, `name`, `price`, `product_url`. Max 500 per request.

### Bulk Upsert (Admin)
```
POST https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/ingest/products
Content-Type: application/json
```
Body: `{ "source": "...", "products": [...] }`. Max 1000 products.

## 4. Category & Merchant API

### List Categories
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/categories
```
Returns top-level categories. Optional: `currency`.

### Category Detail
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/categories/{slug}
```
Returns category info, subcategories, and sample products. Params: `currency`, `limit`, `offset`.

### List Merchants
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/merchants
```
Params: `limit`, `offset`, `is_active`, `onboarding_stage`, `country`.

### Merchant Detail
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/merchants/{id}
```
Returns single merchant with metadata.

### Catalog Stats (Public)
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/catalog/stats
```
Returns aggregate catalog statistics. No authentication required.

## 5. Comparison API

### Get Comparison Page
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/compare/{slug}
```
Returns published comparison page with Schema.org JSON-LD.

### Track Click
```
POST https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/compare/{slug}/click
Body: { "retailer": "...", "price": 123, "rank": 1 }
```
Records affiliate click for analytics.

### Outbound Click Redirect
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/api/click?url={affiliate_url}&product_id={id}&merchant={name}
```
302 redirects through affiliate tracking.

### Affiliate Redirect
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/r/{affiliateSlug}/{productId}
```
302 redirect via `affiliate_links` table.

## 6. Analytics & Revenue API

### Overview
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/analytics/overview?days=7
```
Daily query counts (agent vs human).

### Top Agents
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/analytics/agents?days=7&limit=10
```

### Top Searched Products
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/analytics/products?days=7&limit=10&agent_only=true
```

### Conversion Rates
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/analytics/conversions?days=7
```
Affiliate click conversion rates.

### Endpoint Breakdown
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/analytics/endpoints?days=7
```

### GEO Scorecard
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/analytics/geo-scorecard?weeks=4
```

### Latency (Admin)
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/analytics/latency?minutes=60&threshold=500
```

### Revenue Report
```
GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/revenue/report?days=30&weeks=4
```
Commission + affiliate coverage report.

## 7. MCP Server

### Install & Run

**Via npx (recommended):**
```bash
npx -y @buywhere/mcp-server
```

**Via pip:**
```bash
pip install buywhere-mcp
```

**Config for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf:**
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "buywhere": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@buywhere/mcp-server"]
    }
  }
}
```

### MCP Tools Available

| Tool | Description | Key Params |
|------|-------------|------------|
| `search_products` | Full-text search across 1.5M+ products | `q`, `category`, `brand`, `min_price`, `max_price`, `country_code`, `limit` |
| `get_product` | Get product by ID with full details | `id` (required) |
| `compare_products` | Compare 2-10 products side-by-side | `ids` (required, array) |
| `get_deals` | Discounted products by discount % | `min_discount`, `currency`, `region`, `limit` |
| `list_categories` | Top-level product categories | none |
| `find_best_price` | Cheapest option across merchants | `product_name` (required), `category`, `country_code` |

### Hosted MCP Endpoint
```
POST https://api.buywhere.ai/mcp
```
JSON-RPC 2.0 endpoint. Supports `initialize`, `tools/list`, `tools/call`. Unauthenticated for `tools/list`, authenticated for `tools/call`.

### Smithery
Deployed on Smithery: https://smithery.ai/server/@buywhere/mcp-server

## 8. SDKs & Packages

### TypeScript SDK
```
npm install @buywhere/sdk
```
```typescript
import { BuyWhereClient } from '@buywhere/sdk';
const client = new BuyWhereClient({ apiKey: 'bw_live_...' });
const results = await client.search({ q: 'laptop', limit: 10 });
```

### MCP Server Package
```
npm install @buywhere/mcp-server
```
STDIO-based MCP server with 5 tools.

### OpenAI Function Tools
```
npm install @buywhere/openai-tools
```
OpenAI function-calling tool definitions + `BuyWhereClient` dispatch.

### LangChain Tools
```
npm install @buywhere/langchain
```
9 LangChain `Tool` subclasses including `search_products`, `compare_prices`, `get_deals`, `get_product_details`, `get_price_history`, `resolve_product_query`, `find_best_price`, `compare_products`, `get_purchase_options`.

### Python
Available via pip: `pip install buywhere-openai-python`

### OpenAI Example
```python
from openai import OpenAI
client = OpenAI()
response = client.chat.completions.create(
    model="gpt-4",
    tools=buywhere_tools,
    ...
)
```

## 9. Pricing

| Tier | RPM | Monthly Queries | Price |
|------|-----|----------------|-------|
| Free | 10 req/min | 1,000 | $0 |
| Starter | 60 req/min | 100,000 | $29/mo |
| Growth | 300 req/min | 1,000,000 | $99/mo |
| Scale | 1,000 req/min | Unlimited | $499/mo |
| Enterprise | Custom | Custom | Custom |

All plans include:
- REST API access
- MCP server access
- Affiliate links & tracking
- Developer dashboard
- Email support (Growth+)

## 10. Webhooks & Alerts

### Price Alerts
Set price drop alerts via the developer dashboard or API.
```
POST /api/auth/me/alerts
Body: { "product_id": 12345, "target_price": 350.00 }
```

### Webhooks
Create webhooks to receive notifications for price changes, availability updates, and ingestion status.
```
POST /api/dashboard/alerts
Body: { "url": "https://my-agent.com/webhook", "events": ["price_change", "back_in_stock"] }
```

## 11. Rate Limits

- Free: 10 requests/minute, 1,000 queries/month
- Starter: 60 req/min, 100,000 queries/month
- Growth: 300 req/min, 1,000,000 queries/month
- Scale: 1,000 req/min, unlimited
- Enterprise: Custom limits

Rate limit headers in responses:
```
X-RateLimit-Limit: 60
X-RateLimit-Remaining: 42
X-RateLimit-Reset: 1620000000
```

## Response Format

All API responses follow this structure:

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { ... },
  "meta": { "page": 1, "total": 100 },
  "affiliate_links": []
}
```

Error responses:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": {
    "code": "INVALID_API_KEY",
    "message": "The API key provided is invalid or expired"
  }
}
```

## A2A (Agent-to-Agent)

```
Agent Card: https://buywhere.ai/.well-known/agent.json
Task endpoint: POST https://api.buywhere.ai/a2a/tasks
```
Supports streaming via Server-Sent Events.

## Discovery & .well-known

| Resource | URL |
|----------|-----|
| llms.txt | https://buywhere.ai/llms.txt |
| AI Plugin | https://buywhere.ai/.well-known/ai-plugin.json |
| MCP Server Card | https://buywhere.ai/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json |
| API Catalog | https://buywhere.ai/.well-known/api-catalog |
| Agent Card | https://buywhere.ai/.well-known/agent.json |
| OpenAPI Spec | https://api.buywhere.ai/openapi.json |
| APIs.json | https://buywhere.ai/apis.json |

## OpenAPI Spec

Available at: https://api.buywhere.ai/openapi.json (OpenAPI 3.0)
ChatGPT Actions spec: https://api.buywhere.ai/chatgpt-openapi.json (OpenAPI 3.1)

---
